steps.title: Spot the pattern between the two sentences
steps.content: Sentence 2 makes a general claim (the 1991 parade was one of many military parades). Sentence 3 provides concrete evidence in summary form: the actual total count of such parades (29 from 1886–2022). The transition must signal a move from the general claim to a summary of supporting evidence.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: ”In sum” introduces a summary statement that provides concrete evidence backing the general claim in sentence 2. The other three are incorrect: “Hence” signals causation, “In other words” signals rephrasing, and “Nevertheless” signals contrast—none of which fit. That matches choice D — D is correct.
